name: rag
description: A thin, configurable connector that sends queries to an external RAG service and returns ranked passages — endpoint, auth, and response schema are injected via config, never hardcoded.

RAG_ENDPOINT_URL.title: RAG endpoint URL
RAG_ENDPOINT_URL.description: Base URL of the RAG service to query (e.g. https://rag.example.com/search)

RAG_CREDENTIAL.title: RAG credential
RAG_CREDENTIAL.description: API key or bearer token for the RAG service. Required unless auth type is 'none'.

RAG_AUTH_TYPE.title: Auth type
RAG_AUTH_TYPE.description: How the endpoint authenticates: none | api_key | bearer | custom_header
